caption: Against a plain, light-gray background, a logo featuring the letters "MP" evolves over time. Initially, the logo is a large, thin, white outline of the letters "MP," with a light bulb icon integrated into the center. As the sequence progresses, the logo rapidly shrinks in size and shifts in position towards the right. Simultaneously, the outline fills in with a dark blue color, and the integrated light bulb becomes more detailed, appearing as a colorful, illustrated icon. By the final frames, the logo stabilizes in size and color, appearing as a solid, dark blue "MP" with the detailed light bulb centered between the two letters. The animation creates a smooth transition from a large, minimalist sketch to a small, polished, and colorful brand mark.
